title: GLARKS Luggage Straps and Tags Set, 15Pcs Adjustable Suitcase Belts Packing Straps and Plastic Luggage Identifiers for Men Women, Orange, Green, Pink, Blue, Yellow
features: ♛【What You Get】: In this kit, you will receive 10pcs luggage tags in 5 different colors, each color 2pcs, and each with a transparent loop; 5pcs different colored luggage straps, totaling 25pcs. The luggage tag size is 86 x 50mm/3.38 x 1.96inch, the packing strap is 180 x 50mm/70.86 x 1.96inch and the loops is 165mm/6.49inch long. A sufficient number of luggage tags and straps will meet your daily travel needs.

♛【Reliable Material】 : This heavy duty luggage strap is made of high-quality acrylonitrile butadiene styrene material, durable, sturdy, high strength, bright colored, wear-resistant, adjustable and not easy to break or fade. The luggage tag is made from high quality plastic, which can be bent and has the characteristics of waterproof, rust proof, anti-corrosion, and non fading. They can be used for a long time and can save you money.

♛【Multiple Colors】 : Our luggage straps have 5 classic colors: orange, fluorescent green, pink, royal blue and yellow. These luggage tags come in 5 bright colors: light green, black, white, pink and red. The bright colors can help you quickly identify luggage at airports or trains, saving time and convenience.

♛【Special Design】 : Our suitcase belts adopt an adjustable design,equipped with adjustable buckle and connecting clip. The length of the belt can be adjusted to fix the bag or box on the luggage, which is not easy to fall off. In addition, you can write your information on the card of the luggage tags, which makes it easily to identify your luggage and provide contact information in case of lost.

♛【Wide Application】 : This kit is ideal for any carry-on luggage, handbag, school bag, backpack, briefcase, suitcase, etc. Suitable for girls, boys, men, women, and children to travel by bus, train, highway, plane, ship, or other means of transportation. For travelers, this is also a unique gift, so you can give it as a gift to your family, friends, mates, or other who will travel.
